title: Normalize audit priorities
do: Use P0 for sitewide noindex, important blocked pages, failed builds, malware, hacked content, and insecure sensitive forms.
Use P1 for important page noindex, missing titles/H1s on important templates, canonical strategy issues, and major ecommerce/local conflicts.
Use P2 for missing descriptions, thin pages, weak internal linking, and accessibility issues.
dont: Do not mark guesses as P0.
Do not bury indexing, security, or build blockers under minor issues.
